item.summary: Products may be potentially contaminated with Salmonella. Product details: #003020 Sour Cream & Onion, Net Wt: 10 lbs. JCB Flavors, 1224 Clark St. Watertown, WI 53094.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 5 cases (2 - 10 lb. bags per case)
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
